headline: 暑期档新片激战，痴迷火遮眼领跑
headlineEn: Summer Blockbuster Battle: 'Obsession' and 'Blinded by Fire' Lead
summary: 今日两部新片上映，本周共四部新片。《痴迷》与《火遮眼》持续霸榜，动画续集《海洋奇缘：启航》热度不减。
summaryEn: Two new movies released today, four this week. 'Obsession' and 'Blinded by Fire' dominate charts; animated sequel 'Moana: Voyage' stays hot.

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》本周热度攀升，引发怀旧潮。
industryHighlights.en: Toy Story 5 gains traction this week, sparking nostalgia.

industryHighlights.text: 《末日地堡》口碑发酵，成暑期黑马。
industryHighlights.en: Silo: The End times gains word-of-mouth, a summer sleeper hit.

industryHighlights.text: 《鬼上车》因惊悚题材获年轻观众关注。
industryHighlights.en: Ghost Ride draws young audiences with horror genre.

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》等多部大片即将来袭，市场预期高涨。
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming blockbusters like Avatar: The Last Airbender fuel high market expectations.
